usage: add_interposer_route_block [-help] -cell <string> -inst <string> -location {x y} -orient {R0 R90 R180 R270 MX MY MX90 MY90}

options.name: -cell
options.description: specifies the master cell name that need to be repeated

options.name: -location
options.description: specifies the clone block's origin location

options.name: -orient
options.description: {R0 R90 R180 R270 MX MY MX90 MY90} specifies the orientation of the clone block compared with the master
